title: taraxacum verutigerum
intro: Taraxacum verutigerum, also known as the upright dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving digestion, due to its high content of vitamins and minerals. Taraxacum verutigerum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
